Invest in the careers of top MLB prospects. Earn as they do.

Pick a prospect. Buy shares through an SEC registered broker dealer. If they sign an MLB contract, you earn a fixed percentage of their salary.

Structured athlete agreements.

No loans. No equity. Transparent income-share agreements.

How Finlete works

How Finlete works

Your journey to athlete investment starts here

Your journey to athlete investment starts here

Getting started with Finlete is simple and rewarding. Follow our easy steps to create your account, select athletes, and track your investments.

1

Select an athlete

Browse vetted rising stars and pros from across sports and pick who you believe in.

Browse our athletes

Browse our athletes

2

Buy shares

Invest in a slice of their future earnings through our secure platform.

Shares

3

Track & earn returns

Watch their career grow and see your portfolio performance in real time.

Trust is everything

Backed by top investors, trusted by the community

  • As a baseball fan, investing in a player's future was something I couldn't resist. What a fun way to connect with the game.

    Matt F.

  • Finlete has completely changed the way I think about interacting with and supporting athletes. I love feeling invested in players with so much potential.

    Edward M.

  • Having the option to support exciting prospects has made baseball so much more fun. If they make it I'll feel like I'm on the field with them!

    Sean B.

  • I bought shares because I believe in his talent and want to see him succeed.

    Nathaniel A.

  • One of the coolest investments I've ever been a part of. I love baseball and I love stocks and Finlete combines the two.

    Matt R.

  • It's rare to find an investment with such a personal touch. I get to help make athletes' dreams come true.

    Sophia P.

  • You feel proud when the athlete succeeds because you’ve been with them from the beginning.

    Derek L.

  • It’s not just about sports anymore—it’s about people, dreams, and potential. That’s why I love Finlete.

    Samantha L.

  • I love that I can combine my passion for sports with the investment aspect. It’s truly unique.

    Ethan C.

For Athletes

Are you an athlete looking to fund your future?

10+

At Finlete, we help you secure upfront funding, build a loyal fan base, and unlock new earning potential. You stay focused on your sport while we turn your journey into an investment opportunity that rewards you and your supporters.
